name: browser-control
description: Single Browser tool (16 outer actions + 11 act-kinds) backed by the OpenClaw-port control service. Drives managed Chrome via Playwright over CDP. Eleven legacy tool names kept as deprecation shims for one minor release. ALWAYS ON: enabled_by_default=true is honored via Layer D in registry.py — needed because WebFetch returns empty HTML for SPA pages.
author: OpenComputer
